defense.critical_failure: As success, but the effect lasts 1 minute and the target can't speak.
defense.failure: As success, but the effect lasts 1 minute, and they must succeed at a DC 11 flat check to Cast a Spell with verbal components.
defense.success: For 1 round, the target can't use jaws Strikes, Breath Weapons, or any other attack that originates from the mouth, nor can they imbibe anything, including potions, mutagens, and elixirs.

heightened.text: You can target up to 5 creatures.

spell.name: Binding Muzzle
spell.text: A shimmering muzzle of pure magical force clamps the target's mouth shut. The target can attempt a Fortitude save to resist the muzzle. For targets with more than one mouth, the caster must target a single mouth.

traits.name: Rare
traits.text: This rarity indicates that a rules element is very difficult to find in the game world. A rare feat, spell, item or the like is available to players only if the GM decides to include it in the game, typically through discovery during play. Creatures with this trait are rare. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creatures is increased by 5.

traits.name: Evocation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the evocation school of magic, typically involving energy and elemental forces.

traits.name: Force
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal force damage or create objects made of pure magical force.
